name: Flat-lay · Gift / group composition

do: top-down flat-lay composition with multiple product units arranged geometrically
consistent product orientation across all units
complementary props that say 'gift' without distracting
dont: no random angles (each unit should be aligned, not chaotic)
no foreground objects covering the product label
no people, no hands in frame

body: Top-down flat-lay gift composition for {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, 2000×2000 square. 3–5 product units arranged in a geometric pattern (rosette, fan, or grid) on a {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}} surface. Each unit oriented the same way so the labels read consistently. Two or three complementary props nearby that imply a gifting context (e.g., a single sprig of greenery, a folded ribbon in {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}}, a piece of geometric kraft paper) without dominating the frame. Soft top-down shadow. Subtle vignette focusing the eye on the central unit. No people, no hands.

angles.name: Geometric rosette (default)
angles.description: 3-5 units arranged in a clean geometric rosette.

angles.name: Ribbon-tied bundle
angles.description: Units stacked and tied with a soft {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}} ribbon.
angles.prompt_modifier: Replace the geometric arrangement with a small vertical bundle of 3 units tied with a soft {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}} ribbon. Bow visible top-center. One sprig of greenery tucked under the ribbon. Background remains {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}}, flat-lay angle preserved.
